CustomField.description:
List of missing fields for payroll integration
THL 31.03: Removed the 2nd Tier Candidate OR Statement IF( ISPICKVAL( IP_BorrowedTemp__c , "Yes" ) || RecordType.Name = "2nd Tier Candidate",
CustomField.formula:
IF( ISPICKVAL( IP_BorrowedTemp__c , "Yes" ), IF( ISBLANK( IP_CandidateIDlegacy__c ) , "Candidate ID", "") ,"") & IF( ISBLANK( FirstName ) , "First Name, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Text(Salutation) ) , "Title, ", "")& /*IF( AND(ISBLANK( sirenum__National_Insurance__c ),RecordType.Name = "2nd Tier Candidate") , "NI, ", "")&*/ IF(OR( ISBLANK( MailingPostalCode ), ISBLANK( IP_MailingAddressLine1__c ), ISBLANK( MailingCity )) , "Address, ", "")& /* If( AND( TOE_Completed__c = FALSE, IP_ActivePAYEPayProfiles__c = 1),"TOE not complete, ","")& If( AND( New_Starter_Form__c = FALSE, IP_ActivePAYEPayProfiles__c = 1),"New Starter Form, ","")& */ IF( ISBLANK( IP_WorkerStartDate__c ) , "Start Date, ", "")& IF( AND( IP_IncompleteActivePayProfiles__c > 0, IP_ActivePayProfiles__c > 0) ,"Incomplete active pay profiles, ","")& IF( AND(IP_ActivePayProfiles__c =0, NOT(RecordType.Name = "2nd Tier Candidate"), NOT(ISPICKVAL( IP_BorrowedTemp__c , "Yes")) ) , "No Active pay profile(s), ", "") & IF(AND(IP_IncompleteActivePayProfiles__c = IP_ActivePayProfiles__c, RecordType.Name = "2nd Tier Candidate",ISPICKVAL( IP_BorrowedTemp__c , "Yes") ),"No completed pay profiles , ","") &
IF(AND(OR(RecordType.Name = "2nd Tier Candidate",ISPICKVAL( IP_BorrowedTemp__c , "Yes")), IP_TempestDepartment__c =="0000" ),"Owner Not a Branch Staff ","")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: List of missing fields for payroll integration
CustomField.label: Missing Payroll Details
